kinyarwanda.nba_average_free_throw_percentage_is_7: Impuzandengo y'ijanisha ryo guta kw'ubuntu muri NBA ni ~77%
kinyarwanda.nba_average_3_point_percentage_is_36: Impuzandengo y'ijanisha ry'amanota-atatu muri NBA ni ~36%
kinyarwanda.soccer_penalty_kick_conversion_rate_is: Igipimo cy'intsinzi cy'ibyiza by'igihano muri football ni ~76%
kinyarwanda.mlb_average_batting_average_is_250_hit: Impuzandengo yo gukubita muri MLB ni ~.250 (gukubita 1 kuri 4)
kinyarwanda.nfl_field_goal_success_rate_is_84: Igipimo cy'intsinzi cy'ibitego by'ikibuga muri NFL ni ~84%
kinyarwanda.pro_tennis_first_serve_success_rate_is: Igipimo cy'intsinzi cya serivisi ya mbere muri tennis y'umwuga ni ~62%
kinyarwanda.nhl_average_shooting_percentage_is_10: Impuzandengo y'ijanisha ryo kurasa muri NHL ni ~10%
kinyarwanda.explore_probability_through_experiment: Shakisha ibishoboka binyuze mu byigeragezo. Koresha ibyigeragezo maze urebe uko inshuro zigaragara zegera ku ndangagaciro ziteganyijwe.
kinyarwanda.p_h_p_t_0_5_law_of_large_numbers_as_tr: P(H) = P(T) = 0.5. Itegeko ry'imibare minini: uko ibyigeragezo byiyongera, igipimo cy'umutwe cyegera 0.5. Nyuma yo guta inshuro 1,000 uzaba uri muri ~3% bya 50%, ariko mu rukurikirane rugufi urwo ari rwo rwose icyo ari cyo cyose gishoboka.
kinyarwanda.dice_uniform_1_n_each_d4_d6_d8_d10_d12: Akadomino — buri kamwe kangana 1/N (d4 / d6 / d8 / d10 / d12 / d20)
kinyarwanda.pick_any_die_size_each_face_equally_li: Hitamo ingano y'akadomino iyo ari yo yose. Buri ruhande rushoboka kungana: P = 1/N. Imibare ni imwe muri buri bwoko bw'udukadomino — icyo gihinduka ni umugabanyi. d4 ni 1/4, d20 ni 1/20.
kinyarwanda.two_dice_sum_the_triangular_distributi: Igiteranyo cy'udukadomino tubiri — ikwirakwizwa rya mpandeshatu
kinyarwanda.roll_two_dice_of_the_chosen_type_and_a: Zungurutsa udukadomino tubiri tw'ubwoko bwatoranyije maze uteranye. Igiteranyo ubu ntikingana: ibiteranyo byo hagati birasanzwe cyane. Kuri 2d6, P(7)=6/36, P(2)=1/36. Niyo mpamvu muri Monopoly abantu bamanuka cyane ku mitungo y'icunga — nyuma yo gusohoka muri gereza, 6, 7, 8 ni ibiteranyo bisanzwe cyane.
kinyarwanda.equal_area_sectors_equal_probability_u: Uduce dufite ubuso bungana = ibishoboka bingana. Uduce tutangana → guhitamo bifite uburemere. Udukazunguruka ni inzira yoroshye cyane ku banyeshuri bo mu mashuri abanza bajya mu ikwirakwizwa ritandukanye.
kinyarwanda.sports_weighted_real_world_odds: Imikino — amahirwe y'isi nyayo afite uburemere
kinyarwanda.free_throw_75_nba_3_point_36_mlb_hit_2: Guta kw'ubuntu 75%, amanota-atatu NBA 36%, gukubita MLB ~25%. Ibishoboka si buri gihe 50/50 — imibare ikoresha uburemere butangana mu buryo bumwe, gusa hamwe n'abagabanyi batandukanye.
kinyarwanda.marble_bag_with_vs_without_replacement: Umufuka w'amabuye — hamwe no gusimbura kandi nta
kinyarwanda.with_replacement_independent_draws_wit: Hamwe no gusimbura: guhitamo kwigenga. Nta: ibishoboka bihinduka kuri buri guhitamo — ibishoboka bishingiye ku bihe. Uburyo nyabwo buri inyuma y'ikwirakwizwa rya hypergeometric n'amahirwe y'imikino y'amakarita.
kinyarwanda.build_any_discrete_distribution_test_t: Ubaka ikwirakwizwa ritandukanye iryo ari ryo ryose. Gerageza itegeko ry'imibare minini hamwe n'amahirwe abogamye, erekana ko hamwe n'ibyigeragezo bihagije igerageza rishobora gusubiza ikibazo icyo ari cyo cyose cy'imiterere ifunze. Monte Carlo nto.
kinyarwanda.multiply_along_branches_add_across_lea: Gwiza ku mashami; teranya hagati y'amababi. Guta igiceri kabiri: HH HT TH TT buri kimwe 0.25. Ibishushanyo by'igiti byaguka kugeza ku bibazo by'igipimo-fatizo by'ibizamini byo kwa muganga n'inyigisho ya Bayes.
kinyarwanda.pi_monte_carlo_estimation: Pi — igereranyo rya Monte Carlo π
kinyarwanda.throw_darts_at_a_unit_square_count_how: Jugunya udusonge ku kibuga gifite impande enye z'igipimo; bara ni dungahe dugwa mu ruziga rw'igice kimwe cya kane rwanditse. π ≈ 4 × (imbere / igiteranyo). Kwegera ni O(1/√N) — buri mubare ukoresha udusonge 100× kurushaho.
kinyarwanda.in_a_room_of_23_the_probability_of_a_s: Mu cyumba cy'abantu 23, ibishoboka by'isabukuru y'amavuko isangiwe ni > 50%. Kuri 70 ni > 99.9%. Binyuranye n'ubwenge kuko tubara amagereranya (2 muri 23 = 253), atari abantu. Urugero runyuranye rugaragara cyane mu ishuri ku bishoboka byo mu bwenge.
kinyarwanda.without_replacement_each_marble_drawn_: 💡 Nta gusimbura: buri ibuye ryakuruwe rikurwa mu mufuka. Ibishoboka bihinduka nyuma ya buri guhitamo! Umufuka wuzura nanone iyo wabaye ubusa.
kinyarwanda.keyframes_mbshake_0_100_transform_rota: @keyframes mbShake { 0%,100% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 15% { transform: rotate(-8deg); } 30% { transform: rotate(8deg); } 45% { transform: rotate(-5deg); } 60% { transform: rotate(5deg); } 75% { transform: rotate(-2deg); } }
kinyarwanda.define_each_event_as_a_fraction_e_g_1_: 🎯 Sobanura buri kintu nk'igice — urugero, "inshuro 1 muri 20"
kinyarwanda.add_colored_marbles_to_a_bag_probabili: 🎱 Ongeraho amabuye afite amabara mu mufuka. Ibishoboka = umubare w'amabuye yawe ÷ amabuye yose.
kinyarwanda.drag_sliders_to_set_exact_probability_: 🎨 Kurura ibinyereza kugira ngo ushyireho ijanisha nyaryo ry'ibishoboka kuri buri gisubizo.
kinyarwanda.behind_one_door_a_prize_behind_two_goa: Inyuma y'urugi rumwe: igihembo. Inyuma y'ibibiri: ihene. Hitamo urugi, umwakira azafungura urugi rufite ihene, hanyuma uhitemo: guma cyangwa hindura?
kinyarwanda.last_20_manual_stay_plays_green_wins_d: Imikino 20 ya nyuma ya "guma" y'intoki — icyatsi gitsinda, umutuku wijimye gutsindwa
kinyarwanda.last_20_manual_switch_plays_green_wins: Imikino 20 ya nyuma ya "hindura" y'intoki — icyatsi gitsinda, umutuku wijimye gutsindwa
kinyarwanda.outcome_strips_show_your_last_20_manua: Imirongo y'ibisubizo yerekana imikino yawe 20 ya nyuma y'intoki — icyatsi = intsinzi, umutuku = gutsindwa. Inkurikirane zigaragara zikubwira uko kudasobanutse byumvikana koko.
kinyarwanda.math_says_stay_wins_1_3_33_switch_wins: Imibare ivuga: guma gitsinda ≈ 1/3 (33%). Hindura gitsinda ≈ 2/3 (67%). Hamwe n'ibyigeragezo bihagije, imibare itsinda.
kinyarwanda.drop_balls_through_a_peg_grid_each_peg: Ta amabumba binyuze mu rusobe rw'imisumari. Buri musumari uyerekeza 50/50 ibumoso cyangwa iburyo. Nyuma y'amabumba ahagije, histogram iba umurongo wa zogera — inyigisho y'imbibi yo hagati ikora.
kinyarwanda.gold_dashed_line_theoretical_normal_cu: ⬆ Umurongo wa zahabu w'akadomo: umurongo usanzwe w'inyigisho. Hamwe no kuta kwinshi imirongo yawe y'ubunararibonye igomba kuwometseho cyane.
kinyarwanda.in_a_room_of_just_23_people_there_s_a_: Mu cyumba cy'abantu 23 gusa, hari > 50% amahirwe yo ko babiri basangira isabukuru y'amavuko. Kurura ikinyereza kugira ngo ushakishe!
kinyarwanda.re_randomize_all_birthdays: Ongera ukoreshe amasabukuru yose mu buryo butunguranye
kinyarwanda.each_has_a_random_birthday_same_color_: Buri 🧑 afite isabukuru y'amavuko itunguranye. Ibara rimwe + urumuri = umubiri uhuye. Ongera ufate icyitegererezo kugira ngo urebe inshuro zingahe ihuza rigaragara.
kinyarwanda.multiply_the_two_probabilities_to_get_: 💡 Gwiza ibishoboka byombi kugira ngo ubone ibishoboka bihuriweho. Ibi bikorwa byigenga, bityo P(A∩B) = P(A) × P(B).
kinyarwanda.as_you_run_more_trials_the_observed_ba: 💡 Uko ukoresha ibyigeragezo byinshi, imirongo igaragara igomba kwegera ku nyigisho — iri ni itegeko ry'imibare minini rikora!
kinyarwanda.monte_carlo_scatter_plot: 🥧 Ishusho ry'Ikwirakwizwa rya Monte Carlo π
kinyarwanda.10k_points_needed_for_2_decimal_places: Hakenewe utudomo ~10k kugira ngo habeho imyanya 2 y'ibumba ya π
kinyarwanda.get_5_results_in_a_row_any_mode: Bona ibisubizo 5+ bikurikiranye (uburyo ubwo ari bwo bwose)
kinyarwanda.1000_monte_carlo_pi_trials_error_0_05: Ibyigeragezo 1000+ bya Monte Carlo pi, ikosa < 0.05
kinyarwanda.set_n_23_in_birthday_mode_to_see_the_p: Shyira n=23 mu buryo bw'isabukuru y'amavuko kugira ngo urebe paradox
kinyarwanda.all_outcomes_nearly_equal_in_probabili: Ibisubizo byose hafi bingana mu bishoboka.
kinyarwanda.middle_outcome_dominates_approaches_no: Igisubizo cyo hagati kiganje. Hamwe n'indobo nyinshi cyegera imiterere isanzwe.
kinyarwanda.one_tail_much_heavier_than_the_other_a: Umurizo umwe uremereye cyane kurusha undi. Ikwirakwizwa ridahwitse.
kinyarwanda.two_outcomes_share_roughly_equal_proba: Ibisubizo bibiri bisangira ibishoboka hafi bingana, icya gatatu ni gito cyane cyangwa kinini.
kinyarwanda.three_sliders_set_the_relative_probabi: Ibinyereza bitatu bishyiraho ibishoboka bijyanye by'ibisubizo byo hasi / hagati / hejuru. Imiterere y'ikwirakwizwa ishyirwa muri imwe mu miterere ine itandukanye. Nta manota, nta guhishura — nyereza kandi witegereze.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_free_text_what_combination_: Inyifatizo (inyandiko yigenga): ni irihe huriza rikora bingana? Na bifite impinga?
kinyarwanda.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Fata ibinyereza bibiri bihamye. Imura kimwe. Reba imiterere.
kinyarwanda.find_two_settings_that_produce_the_sam: Shaka amaboneza abiri akora imiterere imwe.
kinyarwanda.what_raw_weights_produce_a_peaked_shap: Ni ubuhe buremere bubisi bukora imiterere ifite impinga?
kinyarwanda.explain_how_relative_weights_produce_s: Sobanura uko uburemere bujyanye bukora imiterere.
kinyarwanda.design_note_discrete_4_shape_classific: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ishyirwa mu byiciro ritandukanye rya miterere-4; nta manota y'ireme-rihuye; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
